x-enumeration-literals.name: IncorrectAccountNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Format of the account number specified is not correct

x-enumeration-literals.name: ClosedAccountNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account number specified has been closed on the Receiver's books

x-enumeration-literals.name: BlockedAccount
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account specified is blocked, prohibiting posting of transactions against it.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TransactionForbidden
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction forbidden on this type of account (formerly NoAgreement)

x-enumeration-literals.name: InvalidBankOperationCode
x-enumeration-literals.description: Bank Operation code specified in the message is not valid for receiver

x-enumeration-literals.name: NotAllowedAmount
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specific transaction/message amount is greater than allowed maximum

x-enumeration-literals.name: NotAllowedCurrency
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specified message amount is a non processable currency outside of existing agreement

x-enumeration-literals.name: Duplication
x-enumeration-literals.description: Duplication

x-enumeration-literals.name: InconsistenWithEndCustomer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identification of end customer is not consistent with associated account number. (formerly CreditorConsistency).

x-enumeration-literals.name: MissingCreditorAddress
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specification of creditor's address, which is required for payment, is missing/not correct (formerly IncorrectCreditorAddress).

x-enumeration-literals.name: UnrecognisedInitiatingParty
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party who initiated the message is not recognised by the end customer

x-enumeration-literals.name: UnknownEndCustomer
x-enumeration-literals.description: End customer specified is not known at associated Sort/National Bank Code or does no longer exist in the books

x-enumeration-literals.name: MissingDebtorAddress
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specification of debtor's address, which is required for payment, is missing/not correct.

x-enumeration-literals.name: InvalidDate
x-enumeration-literals.description: Invalid date (eg, wrong settlement date)

x-enumeration-literals.name: InvalidFileFormat
x-enumeration-literals.description: File format incomplete or invalid

x-enumeration-literals.name: NoMandate
x-enumeration-literals.description: No Mandate

x-enumeration-literals.name: MissingMandatoryInformationInMandate
x-enumeration-literals.description: Mandate related information data required by the scheme is missing.

x-enumeration-literals.name: EndCustomerDeceased
x-enumeration-literals.description: End customer is deceased.

x-enumeration-literals.name: NoMandateServiceByAgent
x-enumeration-literals.description: Receiving agent does not offer specified Mandate services

x-enumeration-literals.name: NoMandateServiceOnCustomer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account is not open to specified Mandates services

x-enumeration-literals.name: NoMandateServiceForSpecified
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account is not open to specified Mandates services for this particular creditor

x-enumeration-literals.name: UnrecognisedAgent
x-enumeration-literals.description: Agent to whom the message needs to be forwarded cannot be located

x-enumeration-literals.name: NotUniqueMandateReference
x-enumeration-literals.description: Mandate identification is not unique to the creditor

x-enumeration-literals.name: IncorrectCustomerAuthentication
x-enumeration-literals.description: There is a problem with the customer authentication

x-enumeration-literals.name: IncorrectAgent
x-enumeration-literals.description: Agent in the payment workflow is incorrect

x-enumeration-literals.name: IncorrectCurrency
x-enumeration-literals.description: Currency of the transaction is incorrect

x-enumeration-literals.name: RequestedByCustomer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Cancellation/amendment requested by the debtor

x-enumeration-literals.name: RequestedByInitiatingParty
x-enumeration-literals.description: Cancellation/amendment requested by the creditor

x-enumeration-literals.name: RequestedByInitiatingPartyAndCustomer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Cancellation/amendment requested by the creditor and the debtor

x-enumeration-literals.name: MandateCancelledDueToEarlySettlement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Mandate cancellation following early reimbursement of the debit by the debtor

x-enumeration-literals.name: MandateExpired
x-enumeration-literals.description: Mandate cancellation following validity expiration

x-enumeration-literals.name: MandateCancelledDueToFraud
x-enumeration-literals.description: Mandate cancellation due to suspected fraud

x-enumeration-literals.name: MandateInitiationCancelled
x-enumeration-literals.description: Mandate cancellation following mandate initiation cancellation

x-enumeration-literals.name: MandateAmendmentCancelled
x-enumeration-literals.description: Mandate cancellation following mandate amendment cancellation

x-enumeration-literals.name: NotSpecifiedReasonCustomerGenerated
x-enumeration-literals.description: Reason has not been specified by end customer

x-enumeration-literals.name: NotSpecifiedReasonAgentGenerated
x-enumeration-literals.description: Reason has not been specified by agent.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Narrative
x-enumeration-literals.description: Reason is provided as narrative information in the additional reason information.

x-enumeration-literals.name: BankIdentifierIncorrect
x-enumeration-literals.description: Bank Identifier code specified in the message has an incorrect format (formerly IncorrectFormatForRoutingCode).

x-enumeration-literals.name: NotUniqueTransactionReference
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction reference is not unique within the message.

x-enumeration-literals.name: MissingDebtorAccountOrIdentification
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specification of the debtor’s account or unique identification needed for reasons of regulatory requirements is insufficient or missing

x-enumeration-literals.name: MissingDebtorNameOrAddress
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specification of the debtor’s name and/or address needed for regulatory requirements is insufficient or missing.

x-enumeration-literals.name: MissingCreditorNameOrAddress
x-enumeration-literals.description: Specification of the creditor’s name and/or address needed for regulatory requirements is insufficient or missing.

x-enumeration-literals.name: RegulatoryReason
x-enumeration-literals.description: Regulatory Reason

x-enumeration-literals.name: SpecificServiceOfferedByDebtorAgent
x-enumeration-literals.description: Due to specific service offered by the Debtor Agent

x-enumeration-literals.name: CreditorNotOnWhitelistOfDebtor
x-enumeration-literals.description: Whitelisting service offered by the Debtor Agent; Debtor has not included the Creditor on its “Whitelist” (yet). In the Whitelist the Debtor may list all allowed Creditors to debit Debtor bank account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CreditorOnBlacklistOfDebtor
x-enumeration-literals.description: Blacklisting service offered by the Debtor Agent; Debtor included the Creditor on his “Blacklist”. In the Blacklist the Debtor may list all Creditors not allowed to debit Debtor bank account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: MaximumNumberOfDirectDebitTransactionsExceeded
x-enumeration-literals.description: Due to Maximum allowed Direct Debit Transactions per period service offered by the Debtor Agent.

x-enumeration-literals.name: MaximumDirectDebitTransactionAmountExceeded
x-enumeration-literals.description: Due to Maximum allowed Direct Debit Transaction amount service offered by the Debtor Agent.
